regional_cost_note: Asphalt contractors in Whangārei typically charge $85–$140/m² for an asphalt driveway and $28–$60/m² for chip seal. Northland rates are broadly in line with the national average, with some capacity constraints for specialist trades. Get a written quote that specifies base preparation — a well-prepared sub-base is the key to a long-lasting driveway.
